channel.title: Sarkari Job on Podbharati
channel.description: Recent content in Sarkari Job on Podbharati

item.title: आईएएस परीक्षा में सफलता के गुर: विजेंद्र सिंह चौहान से बातचीत | IAS Civil Services Exam
item.description: In this episode, veteran educator and coach Vijender Singh Chauhan ‘Masijeevi’ demystifies the Civil Services Examination and provides useful tips for IAS aspirants; a passing thought for the occasions that demand “daring”, and an interesting anecdote of an investment opportunity that the sharks refused in the recently concluded, maiden season, of Shark Tank India show. Will they regret it, like the sharks from the original American show did 9 years ago?
